title: Wezxek PVP pack
description: A highly optimized PvP pack made by Wezxe, engineered for competitive Minecraft combat on Fabric 1.21+. This pack combines performance-focused resource packs with carefully selected client-side optimization.
body:
# **Wezxe PVP pack**

A highly optimized PvP pack made by Wezxe for Fabric 1.21+, combining minimal visuals and performance-focused mods to maximize FPS, reduce latency, and improve combat clarity. Featuring Bare Bones–style textures, low-fire visuals, small items, and precise model fixes, alongside Sodium, Lithium, Krypton, FerriteCore, and Dynamic FPS for smooth, stable gameplay. Built for serious PvP, crystal combat, and high-intensity fights.



<details>
<summary>Mod in use</summary>


_____________________________________________________________________________________________


### Performance & Optimization

Sodium – High-performance rendering

Lithium – Optimized game logic and tick performance

Krypton – Improved networking and reduced latency

FerriteCore – Reduced memory usage (Above version 1.21.2)

Dynamic FPS – Smart FPS throttling when idle

### Visual & PvP Clarity

Bare Bones (Resource Pack) – Minimal, clean textures

Low Fire – Reduced fire overlay

Small Items+ – Less visual clutter from dropped items

Small Shield & Totem – Reduced off-hand obstruction

Model Gap Fix – Accurate model and hitbox rendering

### PvP-Specific Optimizations

Marlow’s Crystal Optimizer – Optimized crystal rendering

Hero’s Anchor Optimizer – Reduced anchor performance overhead

Apple Skin - Show food saturation

Crossair Indicator - Show a indicator when player hitbox in range

### QoL & Configuration

Mod Menu – In-game mod configuration menu

Cloth Config API – Unified configuration system

Controlling – Advanced keybind management

Searchables – Searchable menus

Sound Controller – Fine-grained audio control

Text Placeholder API – Advanced UI and HUD support

### Core Dependency

Fabric API – Required Fabric support

### Next version of modpack will have:
More optimzation and more QoL MOD.


_____________________________________________________________________________________________


</details>


<details>
<summary>Credit</summary>

Me


</details>
